sections.paragraph:
ἀπεϰδέχομαι [ἀπό, ἐκδέχομαι] ‘remain in a state of waiting for an expected event to take place’, await, wait upon

—a. in display of patience 1 Pt 3:20.

—b. with contextual nuance of eagerness/longing, eagerly await, look forward to Ro 8:19, 23, 25; 1 Cor 1:7; Gal 5:5; Phil 3:20; Hb 9:28.
